# Eitan shop

A simple online store focused on selling products. The user is looking to build a straightforward e-commerce website without complex features.

Source: https://eitan-shop-ca7943bf.zappy5.app

---

Why Shop With Us

## Built Around You.Simple, Reliable, Fast.


Everything at Eitan shop online store is designed to make your shopping experience feel effortless — from first click to doorstep delivery.














### Curated Selection


Every product in our store is hand-picked for quality and relevance. No clutter — just the items worth your attention, chosen with confidence.













### Reliable Quality


We stand behind everything we sell. Each item meets a clear quality bar so you can buy with full confidence — no second-guessing required.













### Fast & Convenient


Streamlined checkout, clear pricing, and prompt dispatch. Buy the best tech gadgets online or everyday essentials — and get them quickly, without the hassle.





















Curated for everyday life

## Upgrade Your World,One Essential at a Time


Discover the best tech gadgets and home essentials online — thoughtfully selected to sharpen how you work, cook, and move through your day. Simple products. Real impact.



- ### Desk Setup Premium peripherals and organizers that transform your workspace into a focused, distraction-free zone.

- ### Kitchen Efficiency Smart tools and compact appliances that make every meal faster, cleaner, and more enjoyable.

- ### Smart Daily Carry Lightweight essentials — cables, chargers, and carry gear — built for people who move with purpose.




Shop All Products











Desk Essentials








Kitchen & Carry

## The Story Behind Your Favorite Store — Eitan shop

URL: https://eitan-shop-ca7943bf.zappy5.app/about
Description: Meet the people behind Eitan shop online store — built with passion to bring you the best tech gadgets and everyday essentials at prices that make sense. Learn why thousands of shoppers trust us!

The Story Behind Your Favorite Store — Eitan shop
































































- Collections All Products




- Home
- About
- Contact
0













All Products


















Our Story



## Built AroundSimple, ConfidentChoices


Eitan Shop was created with one clear idea: shopping online should feel effortless. We curate a focused selection of tech gadgets and home essentials — products we believe in, chosen for their quality, usefulness, and honest value. No noise, no endless scrolling. Just the right things, presented clearly.


Every item in our store is here because it earns its place. We built this platform so you could browse, decide, and move forward with confidence — whether you're picking up affordable home essentials or buying tech gadgets online for the first time.




### Curated with purpose.Delivered with care.






















What We Stand For

## Built on Values That Matter


At Eitan shop online store, every decision we make is guided by three simple principles that keep our customers at the center of everything we do.











### Clarity


Shopping should feel effortless. We cut through the noise with honest product descriptions, transparent pricing, and a clean browsing experience — so you always know exactly what you're getting and why it's worth it.












### Curation


We don't list everything — we list the right things. Every product in our store is hand-selected for quality, usefulness, and value. Whether you're shopping for the best tech gadgets online or everyday home essentials, you'll find only items we'd confidently recommend.












### Everyday Usefulness


Great products earn their place in your daily life. We focus on items that solve real problems, save real time, and deliver real satisfaction — not just impressive specs on a page. Useful by design, every single day.















How It Works

## From Selection to Your Door


At Eitan shop online store, every product goes through a deliberate four-stage journey before it reaches you — ensuring quality, clarity, and confidence at every step.













01







### Product Selection


We carefully curate each product in our catalog, choosing items that meet real needs — from tech gadgets to home essentials — so every listing earns its place.







02







### Quality Review


Before any product goes live, it passes a thorough quality check. We verify specifications, inspect sourcing standards, and confirm that what you see is exactly what you get.







03







### Clear Presentation


Each item is presented with honest, detailed descriptions, sharp visuals, and transparent pricing — giving you the full picture so you can shop with confidence every time.







04







### Customer Support Ready


From the moment you order to long after delivery, our support is on standby. Questions, returns, or feedback — we're here to make sure your experience stays smooth and satisfying.












The People Behind Eitan Shop

## Small Team,Big Taste


We're a tight-knit founding team obsessed with curating products that actually deserve a place in your home. No corporate fluff — just honest picks, fast service, and a genuine love for what we sell.














### Eitan


Founder & Head of Curation


The eye behind every product we carry. Eitan scouts gadgets and home essentials with one question in mind: would I actually use this every day?













### Maya


Customer Experience Lead


Maya makes sure every order feels personal. From first click to doorstep delivery, she's the reason our customers keep coming back to Eitan Shop.













### Lior


Operations & Fulfillment


Lior keeps the engine running smoothly. Inventory, shipping, and logistics — he ensures every product from our affordable home essentials online shopping catalog arrives on time.














Curated with taste






Fast & reliable delivery






Customer-first always

Get in Touch


## We're Here to Help You Shop Smarter


Have questions about a product, need help with delivery, or looking for a recommendation? The Eitan shop team is ready to assist. Whether you're browsing our online store for the first time or a returning customer, we're just a message away.

Orders placed outside hours are processed next business day

## Get in Touch


Have questions about our products, need guidance on your next purchase, or looking for support? We're here to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you promptly.





Full Name



Email Address



Phone Number



Message





I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  |

Return Policy
and  Privacy Policy



Send Message














Support Center

## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about shopping at Eitan shop online store. Can't find an answer? Reach out to us.










01

### Where do you deliver, and how long does shipping take?


We deliver across the United States and to many international destinations. Domestic orders typically arrive within 3–7 business days. Expedited and express options are available at checkout. International shipping timelines vary by region, usually 7–14 business days.








02

### What warranty coverage comes with my purchase?


All products sold through Eitan shop come with a minimum 12-month manufacturer warranty. Tech gadgets and electronics are covered for defects in materials and workmanship. Home essentials include a 6-month satisfaction guarantee. Extended warranty plans are available for select items.








03

### How quickly does your support team respond?


Our customer support team responds to all inquiries within 24 hours on business days. For urgent issues, live chat is available Monday through Friday, 9 AM–6 PM EST. We aim to resolve most issues in a single interaction so you can get back to what matters.








04

### How do I choose between different product types?


Each product page includes a detailed comparison guide and key specs to help you decide. If you're unsure whether to buy tech gadgets online or opt for a home essential bundle, our product descriptions highlight use cases clearly. You can also contact us for a personalized recommendation.








05

### Can I return or exchange a product I'm not happy with?


Yes. We offer a 30-day hassle-free return policy on all items. Products must be in their original condition and packaging. Once we receive your return, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to your original payment method. Exchanges can be arranged via our support team.








06

### Is my payment information secure when I shop online?


Absolutely. All transactions on Eitan shop are encrypted using industry-standard SSL/TLS technology. We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and other secure payment methods. We never store your full card details on our servers, ensuring your data stays protected at every step.










Still have questions about affordable home essentials or our best tech gadgets?



Contact Support















## Where We Serve


Eitan Shop delivers across Israel, bringing quality products and a seamless online shopping experience straight to your door — wherever you are.










Nationwide Delivery













### Service Area


We ship to all cities and regions across Israel — from Tel Aviv and Jerusalem to Haifa, Be'er Sheva, and beyond. Every order placed on the Eitan Shop online store is handled with care and dispatched promptly.


Tel Aviv
Jerusalem
Haifa
Be'er Sheva
All Regions










### Response & Support


Our customer care team is available Sunday through Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM. We typically respond to all inquiries within a few hours. For order updates, tracking, or product questions — we're here for you.




Response within 2–4 hours



Sun – Fri, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM



Order support & tracking available

## Return Policy

URL: https://eitan-shop-ca7943bf.zappy5.app/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Eitan shop





































































- Collections All Products




- Home
- About
- Contact
0












All Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 5/8/2026



At Eitan shop, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://eitan-shop-ca7943bf.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy


































- Collections All Products




- Home
- About
- Contact
0















# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/8/2026



Eitan shop ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Eitan shop

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://eitan-shop-ca7943bf.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 8, 2026



Eitan shop is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Eitan shop

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









חנות האיקומרס שלך לגאדג'טים ומוצרי בית — מהיר, אמין, מעוצב.

## Terms & Conditions

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 8, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Eitan shop

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - מסחר אלקטרוני provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Eitan shop provides מסחר אלקטרוני through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Eitan shop. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Eitan shop

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
